title: Mobile App Role Permissions Matrix
description: Reference matrix for configuring access scopes across reps, managers, and regional leadership teams.
excerpt: Use this article to prevent overexposed data and ensure each role sees only the actions and dashboards they need.
author: Ezupp Security and Platform Team

sections.text: Role permissions should map directly to operating responsibilities. Start narrow, then expand with controlled audits.

items: Field rep: order capture, visit logging, assigned outlet insights.
Area manager: team visibility, approvals, route adjustments.
Regional lead: territory performance, escalation and policy control.
Verify unauthorized dashboard access with test accounts.
Review role changes weekly during active rollouts.
Export permission logs for compliance reviews.
